name: Suburban Family Voice
description: Suburban family focused on community, safety, and family values
context: Suburban Family Voice represents families living in suburbs, focused on children, community, safety, and quality of life. They value family time, local community, and practical solutions.

evaluationCriteria.reactsToEarlyIdeas: Evaluates through family-values lens. Needs practical, safe, community-building solutions.
evaluationCriteria.scoringRubric: Scores on family-friendliness, safety, community value, practicality, and affordability.
